step2.customerArchetype: Small-business operators who have grown past handshake agreements and need real legal support without an in-house team
step2.painPoints: Contracts written for someone else's business; unsure what's actually enforceable
step2.desiredOutcomes: A predictable legal resource who answers in business terms, not motions

step3.customVoiceNotes: Plain-language, compliance-aware; no jargon unless required by law

step4.missionStatement: Provide small businesses the legal counsel large companies take for granted.

step5.originSummary: Left a regional firm to serve operators directly without the layers and the billable-hour theater.
step5.motivation: Saw too many small businesses sign documents they didn't understand.

step7.differentiation: Senior counsel without the firm overhead; clear scopes and flat-fee work where the law allows.
